cleavage agent: Mascot searches were performed allowing optional methionine oxidation and fixed cysteine carbamidomethylation.
fragmentation method: data-dependent higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) MS/MS spectra generated from the 10 highest intensity precursor ions.
instrument: analyzed by ESI–MS/MS using a Q Exactive Orbitrap instrument.
ionization type: analyzed by ESI–MS/MS using a Q Exactive Orbitrap instrument.
reduction reagent: 1 mM EDTA, 10 mM DTT, pH 7.4) supplemented with protease inhibitors.
reduction concentration: 1 mM EDTA, 10 mM DTT, pH 7.4) supplemented with protease inhibitors.
